item.title: ZmDAR1;limtf4
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: GRMZM2G099328 Gene Symbol: ZmDAR1 limtf4 Gene Name: LIM-transcription factor 4 Genome: B73_RefGen_v3 Species: Zea mays Functional Descriptions: The over-expression of Zmda1 and ZmDAR1 promoted kernel development, resulting in a more developed basal endosperm transfer cell layer (BETL) than WT and enhanced expression of starch synthase genes.
